frame_analyses.description: Initial setup view showing FLS trainer with red foam appendage. Task title 'Endoloop' visible on screen
Right grasper approaching endoloop suture material, beginning to manipulate the pre-tied loop
Right grasper has engaged the endoloop, beginning deployment sequence
Loop being opened and positioned, approaching the foam appendage target area
Loop fully deployed and being maneuvered around the foam appendage
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Adequate loop size for appendage diameter

frame_analyses.description: Loop positioned around appendage, beginning to advance toward the marked target line
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good positioning technique, appendage fully within loop

frame_analyses.description: Loop being positioned at the marked line on the appendage
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Careful positioning, appears to be at appropriate location

frame_analyses.description: Beginning cinching process, tightening the loop at the target location
Loop being tightened, appears securely positioned at marked line
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good tension applied, loop appears tight

frame_analyses.description: Beginning to cut excess suture tail after successful loop placement
Task completion - loop secured at marked line, excess material being trimmed

penalties.description: Loop placement appears to be approximately 1-2mm from the marked line

confidence_rationale: Good overall visualization of the task progression and completion. Loop placement assessment limited by camera angle - exact distance from marked line estimated from visible frames. Appendage remained intact throughout procedure.
cannot_determine: Exact millimeter deviation from marked line due to camera angle and lighting
Precise assessment of loop tightness - appears adequate but difficult to measure objectively
technique_summary: Solid intermediate performance with methodical approach to loop deployment and placement. Total time of 70 seconds falls within intermediate range (40-90s). Good technique throughout with controlled movements.
improvement_suggestions: More precise loop positioning to minimize deviation from marked line
Faster initial loop deployment to improve overall time
Practice targeting exact marked position for optimal scoring
